bead.title: epic: project-local installs, no symlinks, retire global ddx state
bead.description:
Make every ddx install fully project-local. The only global ddx artifact is ddx-server. Children:
- Bead 0: FEAT-015 spec amendment
- Bead 1: shared skill installer + ddx init rewire
- Bead 2: project-local plugin installs (registry + --local + remove install --global)
- Bead 3: runtime fallback + audit migration
- Bead 4: commit-by-default (.gitignore + docs)

Decisions (locked):
1. Drop global skills targets ~/.agents/skills/, ~/.claude/skills/.
2. ddx init/install only ever touch <projectRoot>.
3. Stale ~/.ddx/installed.yaml entries: no-op uninstall.
4. <projectRoot>/.ddx/plugins/, <projectRoot>/.agents/skills/, <projectRoot>/.claude/skills/ are committed.
5. Cross-platform invariant: ddx creates zero symlinks during install. Plugin source-side symlinks not materialized.
6. ddx install --global is removed.
7. Manifest with ~-prefixed Root.Target rejected with non-zero exit.
8. Sequence: 5 beads (0 → 1 → 2 → {3,4} parallel).
bead.acceptance: All 5 child beads (0-4) closed with passing AC. Final grep gate (bead 4) returns no hits for ~/.ddx/plugins, ~/.agents/skills, ~/.claude/skills outside FEAT-015 history and CHANGELOG. Repo dogfoods the change: this repo's .agents/skills/, .claude/skills/, .ddx/plugins/ are committed.
